artifact_summary: OSIsoft quotation for Carahsoft Technology Corp totaling $174,126.62, valid in late 2024.
artifact_blurb: A redacted screenshot of a formal financial quotation issued by OSIsoft, LLC to Carahsoft Technology Corp. The document outlines a transaction value of $174,126.62 with an expiration window scheduled for late 2024. Specific line items and project identifiers have been obscured to protect sensitive commercial data.
